title: SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST PORTLAND OFFICE SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with lawful permanent residency (Green Card), visa services, assistance in acquiring passports including passport photos, asylum services, translation and notary services, travel documents and re-entry permits, and other legal services. 7931 NE Halsey Street Suite 200 Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Individuals who are refugees, asylees, or immigrants Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2:30pm Email (503) 731-9568 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 731-9568 Intake (971) 351-6557 Zachary Shaffer Intake Supervisor Ii [email protected] Alternate (971) 888-7831 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or information. Pre-screening takes 30-45 minutes. FEES: Fingerprints: $20. Initial consultation: $40-$100. Other costs vary by service. DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Vietnamese, Russian, Ukrainian AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 9am-2:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus stops and MAX station nearby Services: Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON REFUGEE SCHOOL IMPACT PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - REFUGEE RECEPTION AND PLACEMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MULTICULTURAL COUNSELING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST PORTLAND OFFICE
